title: Support chat, remote desktop, and explorer context menu
description:
Four regressions on pipeshare.live (BASE/SAAS): typed chat messages still did not sync, remote desktop was missing or broken on one side, remote support from chat failed cross-tenant, and right-click Create project structure did nothing.

Root cause for chat/remote sync: Express registered /chat/:sessionId and /remote/:sessionId routes before the static /chat/active, /chat/pending, and /remote/active handlers, so poll requests hit the wrong handler (sessionId literal "active"). Backend now registers static lookup routes first, adds participant fallback for remote sessions, and returns tenantId on session payloads. Frontend shows Remote desktop on both chat sides, passes chat tenantId into remote requests, and always passes employee explorer menu items to the dual context menu.

Who is affected: PipeShare support chat, remote assistance, and file explorer on the private OVH server. SaaS when the next platform version is applied in cPanel releases.
changeLog: Fix Express route order so /chat/active and /remote/active poll endpoints work.
Remote session lookup uses participant fallback and stable auth user ids.
Remote desktop toolbar button visible on customer and support during active chat.
Chat toolbar remote desktop passes customer tenantId for cross-tenant admin.
Explorer context menu always includes employee actions (project structure).
